TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang hororok ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Sitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 19 buwan, 50 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 47 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, saySiyat 92%, Tayan 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na hororok hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na hororok hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na hororok hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na hororok hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na hororok hya' ga walo'. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ħororok ɣa nija mki s~ɕku βjori keŋ atu s~ɕitan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, s~ɕajs~ɕijat **%, tajan *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ħororok ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ħororok ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħororok ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħororok ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħororok ħjaʔ ɣa waloʔ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang hororok ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Sitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 19 buwan, 50 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 47 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, saySiyat 92%, Tayan 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na hororok hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na hororok hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na hororok hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na hororok hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na hororok hya' ga walo'. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ħororok ɣa nija mki s~ɕku βjori keŋ atu s~ɕitan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, s~ɕajs~ɕijat **%, tajan *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ħororok ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ħororok ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħororok ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħororok ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħororok ħjaʔ ɣa waloʔ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
